title: Pyramid One
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Pyramid}}
[[File:PyramidOne.jpg|thumb|250px|[[Sardoth]] looking at the building.]]
'''Pyramid One''' was a large fortified [[Pyramid|structure]] built by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Ahakista/Legends|Ahakista]]. It contained [[The Hub (computer)|The Hub]].
